findings.description: Skipped verify/ship stages, jumped from build directly to PR creation. Stage boundary violation.
findings.proposedRule: Never create PRs during build. Workflow is build → verify → ship.

findings.description: Non-skill directories under core/skills/ trigger CI validation failures (count mismatch + missing SKILL.md). 4th occurrence of CI count pattern.
findings.proposedRule: P38: Non-skill directories under core/skills/ require CI test exclusions.

findings.source: Design D-1, D-2 across testing-quality-infrastructure and language-building-skills
findings.description: Orchestrator reads reference files and includes content in delegation prompts. Proven across 2 designs. No dynamic injection, no agent modification.
findings.proposedRule: P39: Orchestrator-level prompt composition is the standard pattern for language-specific agent behavior.
